	nop
	nop
	nop
	dec A
jump_25D7:
	clr A
	nop
	inc 0D0h
	movx A, @DPTR
	mov R0, 82h
	movx @R0, A
	nop
	nop

	dec A
	mov A, R1
	nop
	inc A
	xch A, R0
	pop 0E0h
	xch A, R0
	nop
	nop

	dec A

	nop

	nop
	nop
	nop
jump_25F6:
	dec A
	mov A, R6
	nop
	inc R6
	xch A, R0
	push 0E0h
	mov A, 0F0h
	jz jump_260E
; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	2600h
jump_2600:
	inc R5

org	2601h
	dec A

org	2602h
	jz jump_2613

org	2604h
	dec A

	jz jump_2616

org	2607h
	dec A

org	2608h
	nop

	nop

org	260Ah
	dec A

org	260Bh
	mov R4, A

org	260Ch
	nop

org	260Dh
	inc @R0
jump_260E:
	jz jump_2620
	mov A, #0FFh	; 255   -1 'ÿ'
	sjmp jump_2623

; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	2613h
jump_2613:
	inc R7

	nop

	nop
jump_2616:

	nop
	inc 0A8h
	anl C, 0E0h.6
	sjmp jump_2629

	nop

	dec 07h
; overlapping 1 byte(s)

org	2623h

org	2626h
	movx A, @DPTR

	sjmp jump_2630

	nop
	dec 0Ah
jump_2630:

	clr A
	movc A, @A + DPTR
	sjmp jump_2639
